message:
test: add robot accounts command tests (schema, mapping, determinism, DB round-trip)

wa-nu4.1.5.4: Verify the robot accounts command implementation with 12 tests:
- JSON schema validation for list, account info, pick preview, and refresh responses
- Optional field skip_serializing_if behavior verification
- AccountRecord → RobotAccountInfo mapping correctness (internal fields excluded)
- Pick preview uses same selection logic as workflow engine
- List ordering determinism (same input → same output)
- Empty list handling
- End-to-end DB round-trip: insert → fetch → build robot response → verify JSON

The robot accounts handler was already fully implemented. These tests lock
down its schema contract and verify fixture-driven behavior without network calls.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
